response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience across diverse systems, with strong alignment to the required TypeScript/Node.js/Nest.js/React/Vitest stack and cloud-native practices. His recent AI-agent work and leadership in open-source GISCollective further reinforce his expertise in scalable, user-centric solutions. A 12-year track record with measurable impact in high-throughput environments and enterprise tooling makes him an exceptional candidate.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Hands-on experience with cloud (AWS CDK), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and AI-agent infrastructure
Proven track record of building scalable systems handling high throughput (millions of requests/second) and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited exposure to Kotlin/Java for backend services (secondary requirement)
AI agent development experience is recent and may not cover all nuances required
Some roles involved niche stacks (Dlang) which are not part of the primary stack
